name: tacas-skills
description: Depth pack for TACAS submissions at ETAPS: four paper categories, the per-category blind model, mandatory tool-paper artifact evaluation, ETAPS Artifact Badges, Springer LNCS gold-open-access proceedings, the EasyChair flow, and SV-COMP.

plugins.name: tacas-skills
plugins.description: Twelve TACAS-specific skills for the ETAPS Tools and Algorithms for the Construction and Analysis of Systems conference, covering its four paper categories, per-category anonymity, mandatory artifact evaluation for tool papers, ETAPS Artifact Badges, LNCS gold-open-access proceedings, and SV-COMP, grounded in the TACAS 2026/2027 and ETAPS joint calls, Springer LNCS, and dblp.
